title: Vaada Bin Laada Lyrics Mankatha Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Krish, Suchitra
Song: Vaada Bin Laada
Lyrics : Vaali
Music Director : Yuvan Shankar Raja

Vaada Bin Laada , Oliyaadhe acchoda
Ennai twin tower endru idida
japan-in hykoova, Russia-vin vodhkaava
Nee ennul enna kandupidida

Noolaadai nikaatha idupu oh o oh
Nee vandhu soraakum aduppu oh o oh
Enna thodamale summa soodethura
naana naana vandhu modhuren .....(Vaada Bin Laada ..)

Pathu kadaivadhu thayiraamai yel
Kadaivdhu uyriyathaan endru
Adhu edho adhu edho ennai vaattuthe

Pandri kaichal mathiri,
paruva kaaichal thaanadi
Udhadu udhadu odambu mothamum ketkum

paduka kuthuthu raathiri,
Purandu kathuthu poongili
Nilavu suttathum narambil pattathu theepori

Othungi ninnathu kaalathaan
Urasi vandhathu karava thaan
Manasum kettathu mayangi vittathu -emma emma
enna summa summa ninna thaaakuva

Criket enbathu fixingthaan,
Kaadhal Enbathu mixingthaan -ingu
bet mela bet katti dhinam aadalam

Pandha kandathum catch-u thaan
Pidichi jeipa match-u thaan
Vidiya mattilum veluthi kattuva batting

Ennaku vachathu pitch-u thaan
unnaku vaikanum ichu thaan
Ilamaiku verum 20  over-u podhuma

Adichu aadura dhoni thaan
edhuthu aengra meni thaan
viragam enbathum naragam enbathum onnu onnu
Chinna ponnu ponnu onna kooduthe

Onna ononnah, naan sonna summa sonna
athu seivadhu un duti-yadi
Ai emma emmemmma, summa nee summa
UN istam pola lootiyadi..

Noolaadai nikaatha idupu oh o oh
Nee vandhu soraakum aduppu oh o oh
Enna thodamale summa soodethura
naana naana vandhu modhuren .....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaada Bin Laada, the lively interplay between Krish and Suchitra creates a vibrant atmosphere that resonates with the spirit of celebration. The song is featured in the movie Mankatha, which revolves around themes of gambling and betrayal, making this track a perfect fit for its energetic narrative. The catchy lyrics by Vaali and the upbeat composition by Yuvan Shankar Raja evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a favorite at parties. Overall, the song encapsulates a carefree attitude, inviting listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaada Bin Laada from Mankatha is an electrifying duet that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and fun. With the dynamic vocals of Krish and Suchitra, paired with Yuvan's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the vibrant energy of this track that has become a party anthem since its release!
stanzaMeanings: Come on, don't be silent. Identify me as the twin tower, like Japan's skyscrapers, and the strength of Russia. What do you see in me?
Don't let the thread break, oh oh. When you come, it will be like a cooking fire, oh oh. Without any reason, I just keep burning, I just keep coming...
Ten things can be lost, but life is what remains. That is something, something that traps me.
Like a goat's cry, it's just a seasonal sound. The body is completely heard.
The night is filled with music, the flowers are blooming. The moonlight surrounds, and the firefly is caught in the grass.
What you are doing is just a phase. The arrival of the storm is just a sign. The mind has lost its way - oh, oh, what are you doing?
Cricket is all about fixing, love is all about mixing - here, bets are placed every day.
Catching the ball is the goal. Winning the match is the aim. In the game, I will hit the ball hard.
The pitch is set for me, and you have to be ready. Is 20 overs enough for the game?
Dhoni hits hard, and the score is rising. Both heaven and hell are one and the same. Little girls are coming together.
You are just like that, when I say something, you just do it. That's how it is with your attitude. Oh, what a mess, you are just like that.
Don't let the thread break, oh oh. When you come, it will be like a cooking fire, oh oh. Without any reason, I just keep burning, I just keep coming...
Mankatha song lyrics, my friend. Open the bottle. This is our game. Play Mankatha, come on!
